problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
